search.query: | rest /services/properties/censys-splunk-platform_account splunk_server=local | dedup title | table title

html.div: Please select the appropriate Censys Account to proceed with the host history.
Start time field must be in YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00Z format. Example: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z
End time field must be in YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00Z format. Example: 2026-01-02T00:00:00Z

search.query: | censysalertenrichmenthistory account_name="$tkn_account_name$" host_ip="$tkn_host_ip$" start_time="$tkn_start_time$" end_time="$tkn_end_time$" | kv limit=0 | eval event_history = "View historical host in Censys Platform" | rename event_time AS "Event Time", event_history AS "Event History", resource_type AS "Resource Type", resource_key_values AS "Resource Details", last_enriched AS "Last Enriched" | table "Event Time", "Event History", "Resource Type", "Resource Details", historical_host_link
